name: enqack-loop
description: Iterative self-referential agent loop for Claude Code (enqack edition). Bundles the ADK lifecycle skills (start, plan, execute, review, finish) and the CVR audit runtime (activity ledger, run management, lessons-learned). Feeds the same prompt back on exit until a completion promise is detected or max iterations is reached.

PostToolUse.description: Logs filesystem writes to the daily Activity ledger in knowledge-vault/Activity/.
PostToolUse.note: Wire this in your project's .claude/settings.json — see README for instructions.
